title: Converting an Oracle schema DDL for MonetDB fails to create a column named "no".
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id Int32, no Nullable(Int32));
CREATE TABLE test2 (name String, value Float64, no Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test1 (id, no) VALUES (1, NULL);
INSERT INTO test2 (name, value, no) VALUES ('example', 10.5, 2);
SELECT * FROM test1 WHERE no IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Creating a column named 'no' in MonetDB fails
